headline: Damora Faces Upside As Fast-Follower CALR 'Should Make Bigger Splash,' RBC Says

headline: Incyte Gears Up to Report Q1 Earnings: What Can Investors Expect?
summary: INCY heads into Q1 earnings with a $1.23 billion revenue view, driven by Jakafi, Opzelura, rising royalties and multiple new launches contributing to revenues.
